post_perplexity-sonar.heading_zh: 调用 Sonar 轻量搜索问答 post_perplexity-sonar
post_perplexity-sonar.desc_en: Run a single-turn chat completion against the lightweight `sonar` model, which performs a live web search and returns an AI-written answer with source citations. Optimized for quick, low-cost factual lookups.
post_perplexity-sonar.description_zh: 对轻量的 `sonar` 模型发起一次对话补全：模型实时联网检索后，返回带来源引用的 AI 回答。适合快速、低成本的事实型查询。

post_perplexity-sonar-pro.heading_zh: 调用 Sonar Pro 进阶搜索问答 post_perplexity-sonar-pro
post_perplexity-sonar-pro.desc_en: Run a chat completion against the `sonar-pro` model, which handles more complex, multi-step queries and follow-up reasoning while grounding the answer in live web search and citations.
post_perplexity-sonar-pro.description_zh: 对 `sonar-pro` 模型发起对话补全：在实时联网检索并附带引用的基础上，处理更复杂、需要多步推进与追问的查询。

post_perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro.heading_zh: 调用 Sonar Reasoning Pro 推理问答 post_perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro
post_perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro.desc_en: Run a chat completion against the `sonar-reasoning-pro` model, which applies chain-of-thought reasoning over live web search results for step-by-step analytical answers.
post_perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro.description_zh: 对 `sonar-reasoning-pro` 模型发起对话补全：在实时联网检索结果之上运用思维链推理，给出逐步推导的分析型回答。

post_perplexity-sonar-deep-research.heading_zh: 调用 Sonar Deep Research 深度研究 post_perplexity-sonar-deep-research
post_perplexity-sonar-deep-research.desc_en: Run a chat completion against the `sonar-deep-research` model, which performs exhaustive multi-step web research and produces a comprehensive report. Requests can take noticeably longer than other Sonar models.
post_perplexity-sonar-deep-research.description_zh: 对 `sonar-deep-research` 模型发起对话补全：执行穷尽式的多步联网研究并生成综合报告。相比其他 Sonar 模型，此类请求耗时明显更长。

model.desc_en: Selects which Sonar model handles the request, trading off speed, depth, and cost. Should match the model implied by the endpoint path.
model.title_zh: 选择处理本次请求的 Sonar 模型，在速度、深度与成本之间权衡；通常应与所调用端点路径对应的模型一致。

messages.desc_en: Ordered conversation history sent to the model; the last user message is the query to answer, while earlier turns provide context.
messages.title_zh: 发送给模型的有序对话历史：最后一条 user 消息是待回答的问题，靠前的消息提供上下文。

messages.role.desc_en: Identifies who authored the message: `system` sets behavior, `user` is the asker, `assistant` is a prior model reply.
messages.role.title_zh: 标识消息的发出方：`system` 设定行为，`user` 为提问者，`assistant` 为模型先前的回复。

messages.content.desc_en: The text body of this message turn.

max_tokens.desc_en: Upper bound on tokens generated in the answer; the model stops once this limit is reached. Leave unset to use the model default.
max_tokens.title_zh: 回答可生成的 token 数上限，达到上限即停止生成；不设置则使用模型默认值。

temperature.desc_en: Sampling randomness: lower values yield more focused, deterministic answers; higher values increase diversity.
temperature.title_zh: 采样随机度：值越低回答越聚焦、越确定，值越高则越发散多样。

top_p.desc_en: Nucleus sampling: the model only samples from the smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability reaches this threshold. Usually tune either this or temperature, not both.
top_p.title_zh: 核采样：模型仅从累积概率达到该阈值的最小 token 集合中采样。通常只调本参数或 temperature 之一，不同时调。

top_k.desc_en: Restricts sampling to the K highest-probability tokens at each step; a value of 0 disables this filter.
top_k.title_zh: 将采样限制在每一步概率最高的 K 个 token 内；取 0 表示关闭该过滤。

stream.desc_en: When enabled, the answer is pushed incrementally as server-sent events instead of returned in a single response.
stream.title_zh: 开启后，回答以 server-sent events 增量推送，而非一次性整体返回。

search_context.desc_en: How much web search context the model pulls in before answering; more context can improve thoroughness but raises per-request cost.
search_context.title_zh: 模型回答前引入的联网检索上下文量：上下文越多通常越全面，但单次请求成本也越高。

frequency_penalty.desc_en: Discourages reusing tokens in proportion to how often they already appeared, reducing verbatim repetition.
frequency_penalty.title_zh: 按 token 已出现的频率施加惩罚，抑制逐字重复。

presence_penalty.desc_en: Discourages tokens that have appeared at all, nudging the model toward introducing new topics.
presence_penalty.title_zh: 对已出现过的 token 施加惩罚，促使模型转向新的话题。

return_citations.desc_en: Whether the response should include the source citations and search results backing the answer.
return_citations.title_zh: 响应是否包含支撑回答的来源引用与检索结果。

search_recency_filter.desc_en: Restricts web search to results published within the given recency window (e.g. past hour/day/week/month), useful for time-sensitive queries.
search_recency_filter.title_zh: 将联网检索限制在指定的时间新鲜度窗口内（如近 1 小时 / 天 / 周 / 月），适合对时效性敏感的查询。

search_domain_filter.desc_en: Whitelist of domains the web search is confined to; only sources from these domains are considered.
search_domain_filter.title_zh: 联网检索的域名白名单：仅采纳来自这些域名的来源。

id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this completion, useful for logging and tracing.
id.title_zh: 本次补全的唯一标识，便于日志记录与问题追踪。

model.desc_en: The Sonar model that actually produced this completion.
model.title_zh: 实际生成本次补全的 Sonar 模型。

object.desc_en: Type tag of the returned object, marking it as a chat completion result.
object.title_zh: 返回对象的类型标记，表明这是一条对话补全结果。

created.desc_en: When the completion was generated, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
created.title_zh: 补全生成的时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

choices.desc_en: The generated answer candidates; typically contains a single entry holding the model's reply.
choices.title_zh: 生成的回答候选项，通常仅含一条，承载模型的回复。

choices.index.desc_en: Position of this candidate within the choices list.
choices.index.title_zh: 该候选项在 choices 列表中的序号。

choices.message.desc_en: The reply message produced by the model for this candidate.
choices.message.title_zh: 该候选项中模型生成的回复消息。

choices.message.role.desc_en: Author role of the reply, which is the assistant.
choices.message.role.title_zh: 回复消息的发出方角色，即助手。

choices.message.content.desc_en: The AI-generated answer text, containing inline citation markers such as [1][2] that map to the citations list.
choices.message.content.title_zh: AI 生成的回答正文，内含 [1][2] 等行内引用标记，与 citations 列表对应。

choices.finish_reason.desc_en: Why generation stopped: `stop` for a natural end, `length` when the token limit was hit.
choices.finish_reason.title_zh: 生成结束的原因：`stop` 表示自然结束，`length` 表示触及 token 上限。

citations.desc_en: Source URLs cited in the answer, indexed to match the inline [n] markers in the answer text.
citations.title_zh: 回答中引用的来源 URL，其下标与正文中的行内 [n] 标记对应。

search_results.desc_en: The web search results the answer was grounded in, each with metadata about the source.
search_results.title_zh: 回答所依据的联网检索结果，每条附带来源的元信息。

search_results.title.desc_en: Title of the search result page.

search_results.url.desc_en: Link to the search result source.

search_results.snippet.desc_en: Excerpt of the source text relevant to the query.
search_results.snippet.title_zh: 与查询相关的来源文本摘录。

search_results.date.annotation: 源码未声明日期格式，待研发确认。

search_results.source.desc_en: Name of the publisher or site the result came from.
search_results.source.title_zh: 结果所属的发布方或站点名称。

usage.desc_en: Token consumption and search usage accounting for this request.
usage.title_zh: 本次请求的 token 消耗与检索用量统计。

usage.prompt_tokens.desc_en: Number of tokens in the input messages.
usage.prompt_tokens.title_zh: 输入消息所占的 token 数。

usage.completion_tokens.desc_en: Number of tokens in the generated answer.
usage.completion_tokens.title_zh: 生成回答所占的 token 数。

usage.total_tokens.desc_en: Sum of prompt and completion tokens for the request.
usage.total_tokens.title_zh: 本次请求 prompt 与 completion token 之和。

usage.search_context_size.desc_en: The effective amount of search context applied, reflecting the search_context setting used.
usage.search_context_size.title_zh: 实际生效的检索上下文量，反映本次采用的 search_context 设置。

model.desc_en: Selects which Sonar model handles the request, trading off speed, depth, and cost. Should match the model implied by the endpoint path.
model.title_zh: 选择处理本次请求的 Sonar 模型，在速度、深度与成本之间权衡；通常应与所调用端点路径对应的模型一致。

messages.content.desc_en: The text body of this message turn.

max_tokens.title_zh: 回答可生成的 token 数上限，达到上限即停止生成；不设置则使用模型默认值。

temperature.title_zh: 采样随机度：值越低回答越聚焦、越确定，值越高则越发散多样。

usage.total_tokens.title_zh: 本次请求 prompt 与 completion token 之和。

usage.search_context_size.desc_en: The effective amount of search context applied, reflecting the search_context setting used.
usage.search_context_size.title_zh: 实际生效的检索上下文量，反映本次采用的 search_context 设置。

model.desc_en: Selects which Sonar model handles the request, trading off speed, depth, and cost. Should match the model implied by the endpoint path.
model.title_zh: 选择处理本次请求的 Sonar 模型，在速度、深度与成本之间权衡；通常应与所调用端点路径对应的模型一致。

messages.desc_en: Ordered conversation history sent to the model; the last user message is the query to answer, while earlier turns provide context.
messages.title_zh: 发送给模型的有序对话历史：最后一条 user 消息是待回答的问题，靠前的消息提供上下文。

messages.role.desc_en: Identifies who authored the message: `system` sets behavior, `user` is the asker, `assistant` is a prior model reply.
messages.role.title_zh: 标识消息的发出方：`system` 设定行为，`user` 为提问者，`assistant` 为模型先前的回复。

messages.content.desc_en: The text body of this message turn.

max_tokens.desc_en: Upper bound on tokens generated in the answer; the model stops once this limit is reached. Leave unset to use the model default.
max_tokens.title_zh: 回答可生成的 token 数上限，达到上限即停止生成；不设置则使用模型默认值。

temperature.desc_en: Sampling randomness: lower values yield more focused, deterministic answers; higher values increase diversity.
temperature.title_zh: 采样随机度：值越低回答越聚焦、越确定，值越高则越发散多样。

top_p.desc_en: Nucleus sampling: the model only samples from the smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability reaches this threshold. Usually tune either this or temperature, not both.
top_p.title_zh: 核采样：模型仅从累积概率达到该阈值的最小 token 集合中采样。通常只调本参数或 temperature 之一，不同时调。

top_k.desc_en: Restricts sampling to the K highest-probability tokens at each step; a value of 0 disables this filter.
top_k.title_zh: 将采样限制在每一步概率最高的 K 个 token 内；取 0 表示关闭该过滤。

stream.desc_en: When enabled, the answer is pushed incrementally as server-sent events instead of returned in a single response.
stream.title_zh: 开启后，回答以 server-sent events 增量推送，而非一次性整体返回。

search_context.desc_en: How much web search context the model pulls in before answering; more context can improve thoroughness but raises per-request cost.
search_context.title_zh: 模型回答前引入的联网检索上下文量：上下文越多通常越全面，但单次请求成本也越高。

frequency_penalty.desc_en: Discourages reusing tokens in proportion to how often they already appeared, reducing verbatim repetition.
frequency_penalty.title_zh: 按 token 已出现的频率施加惩罚，抑制逐字重复。

presence_penalty.desc_en: Discourages tokens that have appeared at all, nudging the model toward introducing new topics.
presence_penalty.title_zh: 对已出现过的 token 施加惩罚，促使模型转向新的话题。

return_citations.desc_en: Whether the response should include the source citations and search results backing the answer.
return_citations.title_zh: 响应是否包含支撑回答的来源引用与检索结果。

search_recency_filter.desc_en: Restricts web search to results published within the given recency window (e.g. past hour/day/week/month), useful for time-sensitive queries.
search_recency_filter.title_zh: 将联网检索限制在指定的时间新鲜度窗口内（如近 1 小时 / 天 / 周 / 月），适合对时效性敏感的查询。

search_domain_filter.desc_en: Whitelist of domains the web search is confined to; only sources from these domains are considered.
search_domain_filter.title_zh: 联网检索的域名白名单：仅采纳来自这些域名的来源。

id.desc_en: Unique identifier of this completion, useful for logging and tracing.
id.title_zh: 本次补全的唯一标识，便于日志记录与问题追踪。

model.desc_en: The Sonar model that actually produced this completion.
model.title_zh: 实际生成本次补全的 Sonar 模型。

object.desc_en: Type tag of the returned object, marking it as a chat completion result.
object.title_zh: 返回对象的类型标记，表明这是一条对话补全结果。

created.desc_en: When the completion was generated, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
created.title_zh: 补全生成的时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

choices.desc_en: The generated answer candidates; typically contains a single entry holding the model's reply.
choices.title_zh: 生成的回答候选项，通常仅含一条，承载模型的回复。

choices.index.desc_en: Position of this candidate within the choices list.
choices.index.title_zh: 该候选项在 choices 列表中的序号。

choices.message.desc_en: The reply message produced by the model for this candidate.
choices.message.title_zh: 该候选项中模型生成的回复消息。

choices.message.role.desc_en: Author role of the reply, which is the assistant.
choices.message.role.title_zh: 回复消息的发出方角色，即助手。

choices.message.content.desc_en: The AI-generated answer text, containing inline citation markers such as [1][2] that map to the citations list.
choices.message.content.title_zh: AI 生成的回答正文，内含 [1][2] 等行内引用标记，与 citations 列表对应。

choices.finish_reason.desc_en: Why generation stopped: `stop` for a natural end, `length` when the token limit was hit.
choices.finish_reason.title_zh: 生成结束的原因：`stop` 表示自然结束，`length` 表示触及 token 上限。

citations.desc_en: Source URLs cited in the answer, indexed to match the inline [n] markers in the answer text.
citations.title_zh: 回答中引用的来源 URL，其下标与正文中的行内 [n] 标记对应。

search_results.desc_en: The web search results the answer was grounded in, each with metadata about the source.
search_results.title_zh: 回答所依据的联网检索结果，每条附带来源的元信息。

search_results.title.desc_en: Title of the search result page.

search_results.url.desc_en: Link to the search result source.

search_results.snippet.desc_en: Excerpt of the source text relevant to the query.
search_results.snippet.title_zh: 与查询相关的来源文本摘录。

search_results.date.annotation: 源码未声明日期格式，待研发确认。

search_results.source.desc_en: Name of the publisher or site the result came from.
search_results.source.title_zh: 结果所属的发布方或站点名称。

usage.desc_en: Token consumption and search usage accounting for this request.
usage.title_zh: 本次请求的 token 消耗与检索用量统计。

usage.prompt_tokens.desc_en: Number of tokens in the input messages.
usage.prompt_tokens.title_zh: 输入消息所占的 token 数。

usage.completion_tokens.desc_en: Number of tokens in the generated answer.
usage.completion_tokens.title_zh: 生成回答所占的 token 数。

usage.total_tokens.desc_en: Sum of prompt and completion tokens for the request.
usage.total_tokens.title_zh: 本次请求 prompt 与 completion token 之和。

usage.search_context_size.desc_en: The effective amount of search context applied, reflecting the search_context setting used.
usage.search_context_size.title_zh: 实际生效的检索上下文量，反映本次采用的 search_context 设置。
